_comment: Real Xray + Atlassian credentials. Copy this file to ~/.claude/.xray-credentials.json (OUTSIDE the skill folder) and fill in your values. NEVER commit the real file to git.

xrayCloud._comment: Get from Jira -> Settings -> Apps -> Xray -> API Keys -> Create new key
xrayCloud._fallback_note: If both clientId and clientSecret are left empty, the skill falls back to Playwright browser automation for adding X-Ray native test steps (Step 8 of the workflow).
